<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk002.pdf#page=22 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p92 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk002_p022_img001.jpg|thumb|W<sub>13</sub> Der hl. Korbinian spricht Grimoald und Pilitrud los]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p022_img002.jpg|thumb|W<sub>14</sub> Die Kirche des hl. Stephanus erstrahlt in himmlischem Glanz]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p022_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p022_img004.jpg|thumb]]



----
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p93 -->
